summary: Sprint 3 (Dashboard) backend testing for EDITIONS FABS-CI ERP. 23 new tests added covering /api/dashboard/stats across all 8 roles + Sprint 1 regression. 48/48 tests pass (23 dashboard + 25 sprint 1). Treasury alert, role-aware KPIs, chart visibility matrix, and sort order all verified. DG seed user role preserved (not mutated).
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_data.py is clean and well-structured — single source of truth for mocked KPIs/charts/treasury. Easy to swap with real DB queries in sprints 4-8.

build_dashboard_payload returns a list of KPI dicts that share object identity with the module-level _ALL_KPIS. Safe today because the endpoint never mutates them, but a defensive copy.deepcopy() (or returning a fresh list of dicts) would prevent accidental mutation when real data is layered in (e.g., per-user variation_pct).

FACTURES_A_RELANCER is sorted at request time on every call (sorted() is O(n log n)). For 7 rows it's negligible, but consider sorting once at module import — or storing the list pre-sorted — when this becomes real data.
ROLE_KPIS default fallback ['commandes_en_cours'] silently masks an unknown role. Recommend raising HTTPException(400, 'Rôle inconnu') instead to fail fast.
from dashboard_data import build_dashboard_payload is placed mid-file (line 327). Move to the top imports block for PEP8 cleanliness; current noqa is functional but stylistically off.
is_demo_data boolean is hard-coded True. Good — explicit demo flag that the frontend can use to show a 'demo' watermark until real CRUD lands.
No pagination/caching on /api/dashboard/stats. With mocked data this is fine; with real aggregations consider Mongo $facet + a 30-60s in-memory TTL cache.
test_credentials: Re-used /app/memory/test_credentials.md tokens. For 6 non-seeded roles (comptable, directeur_commercial, gestionnaire_stock, responsable_magasinier, secretariat, service_logistique) the test fixture creates throwaway users + sessions in MongoDB and cleans them up via fixture teardown (verified — no test_token_* entries remain after run).
seed_data_creation: Temporary per-role test users/sessions created and cleaned up by the role_tokens module-scoped fixture. DG user role verified post-run: still 'directeur_general' (TestFinalState::test_dg_role_unchanged green).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 fully green. /api/dashboard/stats is mocked (hardcoded in dashboard_data.py) per request. Test file test_dashboard_fabsci.py parametrizes all 8 roles; if Sprint 4+ changes ROLE_KPIS / charts visibility / treasury thresholds, update ROLE_EXPECTATIONS dict at top of the test file. The role_tokens fixture is module-scoped so creating new role tests is just adding a parametrize entry. BASE_URL is read from frontend/.env as fallback when REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL isn't exported into the shell.
